headline: Charter Communications (CHTR) Valuation Check After A Steep One Year Share Price Decline
summary: Charter Communications stock performance snapshot Charter Communications (CHTR) has drawn investor attention after a period of weaker share performance, with the stock down 18% over the past month and 40% over the past 3 months. Over the past year the stock has fallen 64%, while year to date it is down 33%. These moves contrast with relatively modest reported annual revenue and net income growth.
